title: Gulf states have tolerated Iranian strikes so far — but their 'defensive' stance won't last forever
summary_full: The Gulf states have said Iran's attacks on energy infrastructure won't "go unanswered" but, so far, they have not hit back. That stance could change soon.
summary_public: The Gulf states have said Iran's attacks on energy infrastructure won't "go unanswered" but, so far, they have not hit back. That stance could change soon.
